import Aesop

set_option aesop.check.all true

@[ext]
structure MyProd (α β : Type _) where
  fst : α
  snd : β

variable {α β γ δ ι: Type}

/--
info: Try this:

  [apply]     ext : 1
    · sorry
    · sorry
---
warning: declaration uses 'sorry'
-/
#guard_msgs in
